title: Explorer Daypack 15L
description: Compact daypack with a padded laptop compartment and water-resistant shell. Ideal for urban commutes and light hiking. Adjustable chest strap and breathable mesh back panel.

title: Heritage Henley Long Sleeve
description: Soft-touch cotton henley with contrast raglan sleeves and a three-button placket. Relaxed fit for layering or standalone wear. Pre-washed for a broken-in feel from day one.

title: All-Weather Field Jacket
description: Water-repellent cotton-blend jacket with a flannel-lined interior. Four utility pockets and adjustable cuffs. Built for transitional seasons and rugged everyday wear.

title: Tailored Stretch Chinos
description: Slim-fit chinos with 2% elastane for all-day comfort. Flat-front design with hidden coin pocket. Machine washable and wrinkle-resistant for easy care.

title: Serpent Chain Bracelet Gold & Silver
description: Hand-finished serpent chain in 18k gold and sterling silver. Lobster clasp with 2-inch extender. Comes in a velvet-lined gift box with certificate of authenticity.

title: Pavé Diamond Stud Earrings
description: 14k gold micropavé studs with 0.25ct total diamond weight. Push-back closure for secure wear. Timeless design suitable for daily elegance or special occasions.

title: Crystal Solitaire Promise Ring
description: White gold-plated ring featuring a brilliant-cut cubic zirconia. Comfort-fit band in sizes 5-10. An affordable keepsake for engagements, anniversaries, or self-gifting.

title: Artisan Tunnel Plug Earrings
description: Rose gold-plated 316L surgical steel double-flared plugs. Hypoallergenic and tarnish-resistant. Available in 8mm, 10mm, and 12mm gauges.

title: Portable SSD 2TB USB-C
description: Compact external SSD with USB 3.2 Gen 2 interface delivering up to 1050MB/s reads. Shock-resistant aluminum enclosure with AES-256 hardware encryption. Pocket-sized for on-the-go professionals.

title: NVMe Internal SSD 1TB
description: M.2 2280 NVMe drive with sequential reads up to 3500MB/s. SLC caching and DRAM buffer for sustained workloads. 5-year warranty with 600TBW endurance rating.

title: SATA SSD 512GB Performance
description: 2.5-inch SATA III SSD with 3D NAND and SLC cache for burst performance. Slim 7mm form factor fits ultrabooks and desktop bays. TRIM and ECC support for long-term reliability.

title: Gaming External HDD 4TB
description: High-capacity portable drive formatted for PS5 and Xbox. USB 3.0 with plug-and-play setup. Sleek matte finish with LED activity indicator. 3-year limited warranty.

title: UltraSlim IPS Monitor 22"
description: Full HD 1920x1080 IPS panel with 75Hz refresh rate and FreeSync. Ultra-thin bezel for multi-monitor setups. HDMI and VGA inputs with 4ms response time and 250-nit brightness.

title: Curved Ultrawide 49" Gaming Display
description: 32:9 QLED curved panel with 144Hz refresh rate and 1ms response. HDR600 certified with quantum dot color accuracy. Dual HDMI 2.0 and DisplayPort 1.4 inputs for multi-source setups.

title: Alpine 3-in-1 Winter Parka
description: Waterproof hardshell with removable fleece liner for layered warmth. Adjustable storm hood and zippered hand pockets. Suitable for skiing, snowboarding, and cold-weather commutes.

title: Moto Faux Leather Jacket
description: Vegan leather biker jacket with removable hood and quilted lining. Asymmetric zip closure with snap-button waist detail. A go-to layer for cool evenings and casual outings.

title: Lightweight Windbreaker Raincoat
description: Packable rain jacket with sealed seams and an adjustable drawstring waist. Two side pockets and a lined hood. Rolls into its own pocket for easy storage in any bag.

title: Classic V-Neck Tee
description: Soft rayon-spandex blend with a flattering boat-neck cut. Double-stitched hem for durability. Available in 12 colors, perfect for building a capsule wardrobe.

title: Performance Moisture-Wicking Top
description: 100% cationic polyester interlock with four-way stretch. Quick-dry fabric pulls sweat away from skin. UPF 30 sun protection for outdoor training and gym sessions.

title: Graphic Print Cotton Tee
description: Relaxed-fit cotton tee with original screen-printed artwork. Pre-shrunk fabric with reinforced collar. Unisex sizing from XS to 3XL for an inclusive fit.
